/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,librosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so -o librosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so CMakeFiles/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/src/identifier.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/root/ros2_ws/install/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/lib:/root/ros2_ws/install/rosidl_runtime_c/lib:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /root/ros2_ws/install/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /root/ros2_ws/install/rosidl_runtime_c/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
